chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1309 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 5435/2021 2. For hearing of main case 20.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Yasir advocate holds brief for Mr. Taimoor Ahmed Qureshi, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel, notice has been impugned herein, however, same shall be contested by the petitioner before the issuing authority. He seeks that the notice be adjudicated by the authority vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned counsel further states that it may be just and proper for the respondents not to take any coercive action against the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
